description: MainActivity class for the Android app frontend, handling UI interactions, ViewModel communication, biometric authentication prompts, and navigation logic in a biometric-authenticated session management demo.

classes.name: MainActivity
classes.description: Main activity for the biometric authentication demo, managing login, lock/unlock, protected API calls, and session state with biometric prompts and navigation.

methods.name: onCreate
methods.description: Initializes activity, sets up views, view model, biometric authenticator, and launches observation coroutines.

methods.name: onStart
methods.description: Handles activity start logic, prompting unlock if returning from background.

methods.name: onStop
methods.description: Marks activity as backgrounded for lock/unlock handling.

methods.name: onDestroy
methods.description: Cancels observation jobs on activity destruction.

methods.name: wireClicks
methods.description: Sets up button click listeners for login, lock, unlock, protected call, logout, and clear log actions.

methods.name: observeAuthState
methods.description: Collects authentication state updates and updates UI / navigates accordingly.

methods.name: observeStatusLog
methods.description: Collects log lines and updates UI log display.

methods.name: setButtonsEnabled
methods.description: Enables or disables UI buttons based on current auth state.

methods.name: maybePromptUnlock
methods.description: Checks biometric availability and prompts user for biometric authentication if needed.
